leadin_title: Innovating and Pioneering a Sustainable Digital Economy

leadin.text: FinTech is revolutionising traditional financial services by enhancing transparency and improving access to financial resources for underserved communities. From innovative platforms that facilitate sustainable investment to blockchain and AI technologies that ensure traceability in supply chains, the contributions of these pioneers are instrumental in driving the transition to a sustainable digital economy.

The FinTech Awards 2024 (hereinafter “Award”), organised by ET Net for the 8th consecutive year, stands as a testament to the city's unwavering commitment to fostering innovation and sustainability within the financial technology sector. As a global financial hub, Hong Kong is uniquely positioned to lead the charge in creating a sustainable digital economy, where technology and environmental responsibility go hand in hand.

“Innovating and Pioneering a Sustainable Digital Economy” emphasises the importance of recognising the efforts and contributions of industry leaders, startups, and innovators who are actively shaping a sustainable future through their groundbreaking FinTech solutions. The awards serve not only to celebrate technological advancements but also to highlight initiatives that prioritise sustainability, inclusivity, and ethical practices in finance.

judges_array.title: Judges
judges_array.intro: FinTech Awards 2024's Judging Panel consists of professionals of the FinTech and ICT industry, with members come from relevant industry and professional associations, companies, educational institutes, and government bodies.
judges_array.judges_criteria: Judging is based on the following 5 factors:
